title: streptanthus carinatus subsp. arizonicus
intro: Streptanthus carinatus subsp. arizonicus is a subspecies of the western tower mustard plant, a type of wild flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Streptanthus carinatus subsp. arizonicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
